reviews.comment:
Tiene baños muy linpios. Lugar agradable como confitería y miy buena atención en la playa, para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It has very clean bathrooms. It's a pleasant cafe-like space, and very good service at the beach for fueling up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROWNpMm13RRAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA siempre me reconforta con su calidad de servicio. Tuve la mala suerte del cambio de personal y el servicio se resintió un poco, pero por lo demás, es una estación de servicio totalmente recomendable tanto por la carga de combustibles como para parar y tomar un refrigerio o un pequeño tentenpie al paso.

(Translated by Google)
ACA always comforts me with its quality of service. I was unlucky because of the change of staff, and the service suffered a bit, but otherwise, it's a highly recommended service station, both for fuel and for stopping for a snack or a quick bite.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcnFfb0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me gusta porque cuenta con cabañas con piscina propia de ese sector. También hay un sector para casillas rodantes y otro, para camping con parrillas. Tiene una pileta general para ir a pasar el día y baños con duchas y agua caliente. La atención es cordial. ¡Realmente, lo recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
I like it because it has cabins with their own pools in that area. There's also an area for RVs and another for camping with grills. It has a communal pool for spending the day and bathrooms with showers and hot water. The service is friendly. I really recommend it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNk9mVWRREAE
